title: Zamzom #2157
definition:
Zamzummims = "plotters"

 1) the Ammonite name for the people who by others were called Rephaim,
    and were described as a numerous nation of giants; perhaps the same
    as 'Zuzim'
nasbUsage:
Definition: Zamzummims = "plotters"

 1) the Ammonite name for the people who by others were called Rephaim,
    and were described as a numerous nation of giants; perhaps the same
    as 'Zuzim'

    NASB:  another name for the Rephaim
